warnings: Redaction mechanism is a general LLM stand-in (open-decisions.md #1); OpenMed PHI/PII NER is a flagged-but-not-adopted candidate replacement, not used here.

Breakdown of 8 redactions: phone_number x5 (p3 농협손해보험 fax-header number '02'; p6 KB 고객콜센터 1544-0114 x2; p7 KB 고객콜센터 1544-0114 x2), bank_account x1 (p6 지급계좌 fragment '*'), person_name x2 (p6 예금주 masked initials '. ..'; p7 상품명-field token '정영자').

p7 상품명 field token '정영자' redacted as person_name conservatively per the name over-redaction asymmetry, but it is most likely garbled OCR of a group-descriptor (e.g. '종업원') inside the KB 단체상해보험 product name, NOT an actual person. Retained corporate/product identity around it ('(우)KB [REDACTED]를 위한 ... 단체상해보험(23.01)'). Flagged for reviewer awareness.

Corporate web domains kept intact (kyo-bo.kr on p4/p5; www.kbinsure.co.kr and m.kbinsure.co.kr on p6/p7): they are corporate identity markers, not any of the enumerated redaction categories (phone/fax, street address, policy/certificate/license number). No natural-person PII in them.
Corporate entity names kept per convention: 농협손해보험, 교보생명, KB손해보험 / KB금융그룹.

No claimant/patient/physician/adjuster names, no RRNs, no policy/certificate numbers, and no street addresses appeared as filled values in this document (수진자/생년월일/계약자/보험대상자/수익자/증권번호/재해자 fields were all blank; p5 손해사정사 signature blocks were '(날인 생략)' with no names).

Non-PII OCR artifacts left untouched (out of redaction scope): stray code-fence '```' lines carried over on p4 and p6, and phone-browser chrome text on p4/p5 (kyo-bo.kr screenshot) — these are on-page/OCR content, not PII.
